creator: steve@Watt.COM
text:
Building vim 7 WITH_TCL=yes breaks with "cc: long: No such file or directory".
There seems to be a stray "long" coming in from somewhere.

The full build output:

wattres.Watt.COM:/usr/ports/editors/vim
(root@wattres) 209# make WITH_CSCOPE=yes WITH_TCL=yes WITH_PYTHON=yes WITH_RUBY=yes WITH_PERL=yes
